rows.label: qev086407_MSG0001
rows.name: Unbelievable! Tatsu really find glasses![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0002
rows.name: Is Mamapon proud of Tatsu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0003
rows.name:
Mamapon is proud that Tatsu have
wonderful friends to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0004
rows.name: There's no fooling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0005
rows.name: Go on, Tatsu. Try on glasses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0006
rows.name: Right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0007
rows.name:
Well? Glasses give Tatsu refined
and mature look, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ah, Kaka reminded of
hubbypon when he was young.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0009
rows.name:
Tatsu looks just like Nopon that
Kaka first fall in love with![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0010
rows.name: THOSE are your memento of your father?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0011
rows.name: Memento? Not even funny, Lin-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0012
rows.name:
Lin-san make it sound like Tatsu
dadapon already kick bucket.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0013
rows.name: Wait, he's alive? Sorry, I thought—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0014
rows.name: So where is your father then?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hubbypon chosen as heropon
of legend for this year.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0016
rows.name: Right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0017
rows.name:
Ancient Nopon tradition says heropon of
legend go off to fight wicked gods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0018
rows.name: This year was turn of Dadapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'm not sure it's a good idea to
pick heroes based on turns...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0020
rows.name: Still, it's quite the honor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0021
rows.name: Honor is less important than paycheck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0022
rows.name:
Hubbypon better slay few dozen gods
if he plans to feed many children![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0023
rows.name:
He have until end of year to rack
up bonus and cover expenses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086407_MSG0024
rows.name: Oh come on...[ST:wait ]
